    O

    OBJ_FULL_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    OBJ_FULL_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    OBJ_THUMB_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    OBJ_THUMB_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    Objective - Class in nongui.baseentity
    An abstract base class representing an Objective (Boss Monster) in the game.
    Objective() - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.Objective
    Default constructor for Objective.
    Objective(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.Objective
    Constructs a new Objective with the specified details.
    objectiveDeck - Static variable in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
     
    ObjectiveDeck - Class in nongui.baseentity
    Represents the deck of objectives (bosses or tasks) in the game.
    ObjectiveDeck() - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.ObjectiveDeck
    Initializes a new empty Objective Deck.
    objectivePath(String) - Static method in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    objectives - Static variable in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
     
    ObjectivesBox - Class in gui.board.field
    Represents the central objectives display area on the game board.
    ObjectivesBox(Objective[]) - Constructor for class gui.board.field.ObjectivesBox
    Constructs the ObjectivesBox to display the given array of objectives.
    ObjectiveView - Class in gui.card
    Represents a graphical thumbnail view of an Objective card.
    ObjectiveView(Objective, int) - Constructor for class gui.card.ObjectiveView
    Constructs an ObjectiveView thumbnail.
    Olaf - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Fighter
    Represents the "Olaf" Hero Card.
    Olaf() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Fighter.Olaf
    Constructs Olaf with his base stats and berserker flavor text.
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ClassChangingItemCard
    Triggers when the item is equipped to a hero.
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
    Triggered immediately when this item is successfully equipped to a hero.
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem.BlueBuff
     
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem.TearOfTheGoddess
     
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.AbyssalMask
     
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.DarkSeal
     
    onEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.FrozenHeart
     
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ClassChangingItemCard
    Triggers when the item is unequipped from a hero.
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
    Triggered when this item is removed or unequipped from a hero.
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem.BlueBuff
     
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem.TearOfTheGoddess
     
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.AbyssalMask
     
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.DarkSeal
     
    onUnEquip(HeroCard) - Method in class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.CurseItem.FrozenHeart
     
    Ornn - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Tank
    Represents the "Ornn" Hero Card.
    Ornn() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Tank.Ornn
    Constructs Ornn with his base stats and humble craftsman flavor text.
